LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeQuestChain.description: This quest chain will have you track down the shattered remains of a pre-war mobile base crawler, a massive classified fabrication platform built to recover, refit, and manufacture advanced military hardware in the field. If you can reconnect its scattered systems, you may be able to seize its surviving forge lines for yourself.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeQuestChain.label: The Crawler
LanguageData.VQE_DeadlifeQuestChain.description: This quest chain will lead you through sealed military silos and continuity bunkers left behind by a dead pre-war command structure. As you loot their dark corridors and piece together old war plans, you will uncover what happened to the garrison that never stood down and to the officer who still rules the ruins below.
LanguageData.VQE_TheAncientLab.description: This quest chain will have you explore sealed Vault-Tec blacksites and research vaults where pre-war special projects tried to create improved humans through classified FEV and forced-adaptation programs. Recover their surviving equipment, uncover what became of the dwellers trapped inside, and decide whether those experiments should ever begin again.
LanguageData.VQE_TheAncientLab.label: Vault-Tec blacksite
LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneratorQuestChain.description: This quest chain will have you explore the scattered work sites where Lee Moldaver tried to assemble a prototype fusion power system capable of restoring whole grids. If you recover enough data, parts, and field notes, you may be able to finish her work and build your own reactor network.
